title: Fix sqlite-vec install failure on macOS

content.text: The sqlite-vec native install fails on macOS with a dyld symbol error. How do we fix this?

This is a known gotcha: the prebuilt binary mismatches the Node ABI. Do not edit the generated bindings directly. Instead follow these steps: 1. Remove node_modules/sqlite-vec. 2. Reinstall with the matching platform flag. 3. Run npm rebuild sqlite-vec. 4. Verify with `select vec_version()`. We decided to pin sqlite-vec to 0.1.6 to keep ABI stability.
That worked. Why did we choose sqlite-vec over a hosted vector DB?
We decided to use sqlite-vec because it keeps the whole index local-first with no API keys and no network dependency. The rationale is privacy and zero external services.
